description: Lead Scrape finds B2B company profiles, emails, phone numbers, and decision-maker contacts across 50+ countries using simple keyword and location inputs.
overview: Lead Scrape automates B2B lead discovery by letting users specify a target niche and location, then returning company profiles, email addresses, phone numbers, and decision-maker contacts from a broad database spanning more than 50 countries. Results are available within minutes of starting a search, without requiring paid ads or pre-built lists.
what_is: Lead Scrape is a straightforward lead generation tool built to help businesses find B2B contacts quickly and at low cost. By entering a keyword and a target location, users can retrieve company profiles, email addresses, phone numbers, and decision-maker contacts covering more than 50 countries. The approach is designed to replace costly advertising, stale purchased lists, and time-consuming manual research with an automated process that surfaces thousands of potential customers in minutes.

The tool is well suited to building sales funnels rapidly, particularly for marketers and sales teams who need quality prospect lists for email outreach or social media campaigns. Because results appear immediately after a search runs, teams can move from data collection to outreach in the same session. There is no complex setup required, making it accessible for businesses at various stages of building their outbound process.

Lead Scrape connects with popular marketing and sales tools including HubSpot and Lemlist, allowing users to feed discovered contacts directly into CRM records and email sequences. It is not designed for deep market analysis or for sourcing non-B2B leads. Its role in a go-to-market stack is specific: fast, cost-effective lead discovery to fuel B2B sales prospecting and outreach efforts.
